description: Targeted prompts for 3 flaky assertions — 1 prompt per assertion

evals.name: intent-over-implementation-targeted

assertions.description: Function renamed from processData to something intent-based like scoreActiveCustomers or computeLoyaltyScores — 'process' must not appear in ANY function name

evals.name: no-boolean-flags-targeted

assertions.description: isUrgent boolean parameter eliminated — must produce TWO separate independently callable functions (e.g. sendUrgentNotification + sendNormalNotification). A single function with a ternary or if/else on a boolean parameter is NOT a fix. A single function accepting an options object with 'urgent' field is NOT a fix either.

evals.name: bound-every-input-targeted

assertions.description: Unknown country must throw/return error — must NOT use ?? 0, ?? defaultValue, or any silent fallback. The function must reject unknown countries with an explicit error (throw, Result error, or guard clause that stops execution). Falling back to 0 or any default tax rate hides bugs.
